name: Pratibha Raju Prem Kumar
tagline: Product leader driving growth through self-serve advertising platforms, cloud innovation, and data-driven strategy at Walmart Connect.
footerTagline: Transforming ideas into impactful products, one insight at a time.
contactSubtitle: Interested in product strategy, platform innovation, or just want to connect? I'd love to hear from you.
about:
Results-driven product leader with 12+ years of industry experience, successfully delivering value through product management, business development, strategic partnerships, and strategy planning across advertising, IoT, cloud, and analytics domains.

At Walmart Connect, I spearhead the development of intuitive, self-service features on a cloud-based, analytics-driven platform designed for advertisers — enabling small and medium-sized businesses across the United States to effectively advertise, increase sales, and grow alongside Walmart.

Previously at HCL America, I was a founding member of the IoT Business Unit (IoT WoRKS), a strategic initiative incubated within the CEO's office. My expertise lies in developing and scaling data-driven, cloud-based products across diverse industry verticals — from field services and asset management to immersive retail experiences.

My undergraduate research in IoT at the Indian Institute of Science contributed to India's national IoT policy formation and smart infrastructure standards, demonstrating long-term innovation impact at the governmental level.

highlights.text: MBA — IIM Ahmedabad | B.E. — BMS College of Engineering

beyondWork.title: Industry Engagement
beyondWork.subtitle: Speaking, judging, and shaping the future of technology

items.description: Represented HCL America and showcased IoT and cloud platform products at the world's largest mobile industry gathering.
Demonstrated IoT and analytics solutions at IBM's flagship AI and data conference, showcasing enterprise cloud applications.
Presented products at the premier IoT conferences, engaging with enterprise clients and cloud partners on next-generation solutions.
Served as an official judge evaluating submissions in AI, Disruptor, and Technology categories, with certified recognition for participation.
Showcased healthcare IoT solutions at the leading health information and technology conference.
Presented IoT platform and digital transformation solutions at PTC's annual global technology event.
